creator: jrronimo@gmail.com
text:
I'm just looking to patch games/minecraft-server to the newest available release. I'm not sure how to generate the distinfo file, but the changes needed to the Makefile are:

PORTVERSION=    1.14.2

MASTER_SITES=   https://launcher.mojang.com/v1/objects/808be3869e2ca6b62378f9f4b33c946621620019/

I apologize for not creating a proper patch... I'm still unfamiliar with the process.
